jalapeno-pickled-peppers.name: Jalapeño-pickled Peppers
instructions: Whisk vinegar, sugar, salt, and 1½ cups water in a large glass jar until sugar dissolves. Prick Hungarian wax peppers and Italian frying peppers all over with a cake tester or the point of a sharp paring knife (this helps the brine penetrate the chiles faster). Add both peppers and jalapeños to jar and chill at least 12 hours before using.
Do Ahead: Chiles can be pickled 2 weeks ahead. Keep chilled.

japanese-inspired-grilled-miso-chicken.name: Japanese-inspired Grilled Miso Chicken
instructions: Mix miso, mirin, rice wine, soy sauce, and honey together in a bowl until miso is completely dissolved. Stir in garlic and ginger.

Pour marinade into a resealable plastic bag. Add chicken, squeeze out excess air, and seal the bag. Turn the bag or mix chicken to ensure even distribution of marinade. Refrigerate and allow to marinade 8 hours or overnight, mixing or turning the bag occasionally.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate.
Remove chicken from the marinade and shake off excess. Discard the remaining marinade.

Cook chicken on the preheated grill until no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear, about 4 minutes per side. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).
Remove from the grill and chop into wide strips, approximately 4 to 5 slices per piece. Sprinkle with sesame seeds and serve.

juicy-chicken-breasts-in-the-air-fryer-p.name: Juicy Chicken Breasts In The Air Fryer
juicy-chicken-breasts-in-the-air-fryer-p.original_name: Pechugas de pollo jugosas en la freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 3 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
Freidora de aire, para esta receta hemos utilizado la cosori turbo blaze

instructions: Mix olive oil with salt, pimenton, pepper, garlic powder and oregan well into a bowl.
Untamos las pechugas de pollo por todos lados con la mezcla de aceite y especias. Si se desea, dejamos marinar unos 30 minutos para intensificar el sabor.
To place the breasts in the basket of the air fryer (if necessary, cook in two pits) and cook at 190 ″ 3 ″ for about 10 minutes.
Turn them around carefully and continue cooking for 6-8 minutes more, depending on the thickness of the breasts, till they are golden and well made inside.

Withdrawal and leave to rest 5 minutes, slightly covered with aluminium paper, so that juices are redistributed. They are very good as an accompaniment, for instance, fries at the air fryer, roasted vegetables or a fresh salad.
